name: Turkey Sausage-Fettucine Alfredo
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a large skillet with non-stick cooking spray.
2. Heat over medium-high heat for about 30 seconds.
3. Add the lean turkey Italian sausage and cook, uncovered, for 14 to 16 minutes or until lightly browned and no longer pink in the center, stirring occasionally.
4. Combine the fettuccine with all remaining ingredients except the chopped tomato. Toss until the fettuccine is well coated.
5. Serve on a large platter, topped with sausage and sprinkled with chopped tomato.
